feature: daily-view: tighter calorie header + muted progress bar colors

prompts.description: Move calorie numbers into CardHeader title row with large/small visual hierarchy
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, restructure the Today at a Glance CardHeader/CardContent: pull the calorie display out of CardContent and into CardHeader alongside the title, formatted as large totalCalories + small muted target. Remove the calorie div from CardContent.

prompts.description: Replace vivid progress bar colors with muted 700/60 tones
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, replace bg-rose-400/70 dark:bg-rose-500/50 with bg-rose-700/60, bg-emerald-400/70 dark:bg-emerald-500/50 with bg-emerald-700/60, bg-amber-400/70 dark:bg-amber-500/50 with bg-amber-700/60, bg-sky-400/70 dark:bg-sky-500/50 with bg-sky-700/60.
